features: Rebuilt Scheduled Queue page from a basic table into a command-center schedule management screen
Added KPI row: Total Scheduled, Today, This Week, Recurring Routes, Unassigned, SLA Risk
Added tabs: All Scheduled, Today, This Week, Recurring, Unassigned, Completed
Added filter row for priority, property type, client, assigned guard, schedule type, and search
Added schedule table with selectable rows, priority, schedule ID, property/client, patrol type, next run, recurrence, assigned guard, status, and actions
Added selected schedule right rail with property photo, client/property details, assigned guard, run schedule, services, instructions, upcoming runs, and route preview
Added working controls: Refresh, Auto Assign, Bulk Reschedule, Clear Filters, pagination, rows per page, Pause/Resume Schedule, Reassign Guard, and row selection
Uses local browser overrides for schedule pause/resume, reschedule, and quick reassignment without new SQL
Preserved v3.0.46 dispatch route distance/ETA fix
